prompt:
A powerful portrait of a high-status business leader wearing haute couture luxury formal attire (a perfectly tailored dark suit, clean white shirt, elegant tie). 

Sharp facial features, well-groomed, with surreal details.

Expression and Atmosphere:
A calm, confident, and highly authoritative expression—the focused gaze symbolizes wisdom, control, and global influence.

Pose and Composition:
Half-body portrait (chest up)
A slight diagonal cinematic angle to increase depth and intensity
A powerful executive posture (hands relaxed or adjusting the suit)

Artistic Style:
A fusion of hand-drawn ink line sketches and watercolor textures
Luxury-style splashes of gold, black, and deep blue/red pigments
Dynamic abstract brushstrokes representing power and innovation
Highly detailed realistic face with subtle rough textures

Background:
Clean white or soft neutral base color
Elegant watercolor splashes (gold + dark tones)
A soft glowing halo behind the subject to create a high-end elite feel

Text Elements:
Main Title: "Enter text here" (bold handwritten luxury brush style)
Name: "Enter text here"
Extra Details:
Subtle gold accents to create a billionaire aesthetic
Slight grain texture overlay to add cinematic depth
Minimalist crown or abstract wealth/power symbols

Bottom Signature: "Enter text here"
Optional Quote Section: "Enter text here"

Atmosphere and Tone:
Elite, powerful, cinematic, luxury-driven heritage aesthetic.
